question: A user clears their browser cache and cookies and is then able to log in to LTALink. What is the correct Product Category 3 to use?
reason: Issues resolved by clearing browser cache and cookies are categorised under Services > Browser > Housekeeping.

question: A user's payment page hangs after being redirected to the bank during a transaction. Disabling the pop-up blocker resolves the issue. What is the correct Product Category 3?
reason: Issues resolved by disabling the pop-up blocker or switching browsers are categorised under Services > Browser > Settings.

question: A user's Netrust Token login issue is resolved after reinstalling the Netrust software. Which categorisation should be used?
optionA: Services > Netrust Token Admin > Access Rights
reason: Reinstalling Netrust software to resolve a token login issue falls under Services > Client Settings > Token Driver.

question: An ESA previously had an account with LTA but now cannot log in using their Netrust Token due to account suspension. Which logging template should be used?
optionC: VRL - token login issue (1st time login)
optionD: VRL - CM00058 Unable to process request
reason: Template 1 (access right) applies when the user previously had an account and it is now suspended.

question: A user is logging in with a Netrust Token for the very first time and encounters an error. Which logging template should be used?
optionC: VRL - token login issue (1st time login)
reason: Template 2 (1st time login) applies specifically to first-time logins or new tokens.

question: A user encounters the CM00058 error and it is resolved after clearing browser cache and cookies. Which categorisation is correct?
optionA: Services > Netrust Token Admin > Access Rights
reason: The CM00058 template notes that it applies when browser housekeeping resolved the issue, which maps to Services > Browser > Housekeeping.

question: A user calls in with a question about how to submit hardcopy forms to LTA. This is not a technical issue. What is the correct categorisation?
optionC: Services > Business Rules > Process and Procedure
reason: Non-technical, business-related queries are categorised under Services > Business Rules > Process and Procedure.

question: An LTA staff member calls to request a password reset for their VRLS account. Where should the agent refer them?
optionC: Registration & Quota section at VTL Main Building, ground floor
reason: LTA staff requesting VRLS account reset/unlock should be referred to the Registration & Quota section at VTL Main Building.

question: A user asks about applying for a new ESA account. Which Product Category 3 should be used?
reason: Enquiries about applying for a new ESA account are categorised under Services > Access Mgmt > ESA Account Application.

question: When logging a case for a business-related query that needs to be escalated to CSU, which logging group should be selected in the template?
reason: Business-related queries escalated to CSU use the group VRL-I-Customer_Service_Unit.
